subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Qabli-Akbar! The Wronged One maketh mention of thee from the precincts of the Prison, and counseleth thee with that whereby the Cause of God shall be exalted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قبل اکبر یذکرک المظلوم من شطر السجن و یوصیک بما یرتفع به امر الله فیما
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
